name: English Toffee II
recipeInstructions:
1. Over medium heat, cook the butter, sugar, vanilla, and salt for 5 to 7 minutes, stirring almost constantly until a deep nut brown color is achieved.
2. Pour the mixture into a foil-lined pan.
3. Spread with the melted chocolate and sprinkle with chopped nuts.
4. Allow to cool completely before breaking into pieces.
